title: Investor Readiness
text: We have developed a complete prototype and secured funding from the Tony Elumelu Foundation, showcasing our commitment and potential for success in the ride-sharing market.

title: Market Insights and Business Advancement
text: Through a comprehensive market reserach, we have gathered insights from over 150 of our target market and more than a dozen drivers. We have also secured a spot for Tag-Rides in the ALX accelerator program.
